ui.deprecationNotice: Deprecated: this feature has been superseded by skills. Commands still work, but skills offer frontmatter, supporting files, and auto-loading.

welcome.label: // explore-claude-code
welcome.title:
Learn Claude Code
by exploring it.
welcome.subtitle: This is a simulated Claude Code project. Every file and folder in the sidebar is a real Claude Code concept — the same .claude/ directory, config files, and scaffolding you'd find in an actual repo. Click any file to learn what it does, how to set it up, and see annotated examples you can copy into your own projects.
welcome.subtitleSecondary: Open a file. Read the source. Learn. Build.

void.line3:
Claude Code doesn't shrink.
It expands into every corner of your codebase.
void.line4:
Agentic coding with no limits. Infinite context. Parallel tool use.
Your entire repository as working memory.
void.easterLine3:
200k context window. Infinite ambition.
Some say if you minimize Claude Code three times,
it starts writing your code before you ask.

banner.tagline:
Learn by doing. Every file is a lesson.
Every folder is a chapter.
banner.step1: Browse the file tree on the left
banner.step2: Click any file to learn what it does
banner.step3: Try commands here to see them in action

help.heading: Available Commands
help.tip: Tip: Use arrow keys to navigate command history.

init.success: CLAUDE.md created successfully. Claude will use this as project context.

doctor.heading: Running diagnostics...
doctor.success: All checks passed. Claude Code is ready.

model.heading: Available Models
model.tip: Active model shown with ●. Use /model <name> to switch.

memory.heading: Auto-Memory Entries
entries: User prefers functional components over classes
Prefer named exports over default exports
Error messages should be user-friendly, not technical

error.tip: Type /help to see available commands.

claude-md.title: CLAUDE.md
claude-md.description: How Claude remembers context across sessions. Your project's persistent memory.

settings.title: Settings & Permissions
settings.description: Configure Claude's behaviour, tool access, and safety guardrails.

commands.title: Custom Slash Commands
commands.description: Saved workflows you can invoke with a keystroke.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Teach Claude specialised knowledge it loads autonomously when needed.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.description: Connect Claude to external tools, APIs, and services via a standard protocol.

hooks.title: Hooks
hooks.description: Run custom scripts automatically before or after Claude's tool calls.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Create specialised subagents and coordinate agent teams for parallel work.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Package skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers into shareable extensions.

marketplaces.title: Marketplaces
marketplaces.description: Distribute and discover plugins through curated catalogues.

.claude/settings.json.label: Settings & Permissions
.claude/settings.json.description: Controls what Claude can and can't do - tool permissions, safety rules, and behaviour.

.claude/commands/COMMANDS.md.label: Commands (Deprecated)
.claude/commands/COMMANDS.md.description: Learn about the original slash command system and how it has been merged into skills.

.claude/commands/my-command/my-command.m.label: Command File Scaffolding
.claude/commands/my-command/my-command.m.description: A starter command file showing the prompt template format and how $ARGUMENTS works.

.claude/skills/SKILLS.md.label: What Are Skills?
.claude/skills/SKILLS.md.description: Learn what skills are, how to create them, and how Claude discovers and loads them automatically.

.claude/skills/my-skill/SKILL.md.label: SKILL.md - The Skill Definition
.claude/skills/my-skill/SKILL.md.description: A starter SKILL.md with every frontmatter field, body section, and variable annotated.

.claude/skills/my-skill/scripts/helper.s.label: scripts/ - Executable Code
.claude/skills/my-skill/scripts/helper.s.description: The scripts/ directory holds executable code that Claude runs when following skill instructions.

.claude/skills/my-skill/references/REFER.label: references/ - Detailed Documentation
.claude/skills/my-skill/references/REFER.description: The references/ directory holds detailed docs that Claude loads on demand.

.claude/skills/my-skill/assets/template..label: assets/ - Static Resources
.claude/skills/my-skill/assets/template..description: The assets/ directory holds templates, schemas, data files, and other static resources.

.claude/agents/AGENTS.md.label: Agents Overview
.claude/agents/AGENTS.md.description: Learn about subagents, agent teams, and how to create custom agents for specialised tasks.

.claude/agents/my-agent/my-agent.md.label: Agent File Scaffolding
.claude/agents/my-agent/my-agent.md.description: A starter agent file showing YAML frontmatter configuration and system prompt structure.

.claude/hooks/HOOKS.md.label: Hooks Overview
.claude/hooks/HOOKS.md.description: Learn how hooks intercept Claude's actions to run validation, formatting, and safety checks.

.claude/hooks/my-hook/my-hook.sh.label: Hook Script Scaffolding
.claude/hooks/my-hook/my-hook.sh.description: A starter hook script showing how to read JSON input, check conditions, and return decisions.

.claude/plugins/PLUGINS.md.label: What Are Plugins?
.claude/plugins/PLUGINS.md.description: Learn how plugins package skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers into shareable extensions.

.claude/plugins/my-plugin/.claude-plugin.label: Plugin Manifest
.claude/plugins/my-plugin/.claude-plugin.description: The plugin.json manifest defines your plugin's identity, version, and metadata.

.claude/plugins/MARKETPLACES.md.label: Plugin Marketplaces
.claude/plugins/MARKETPLACES.md.description: Learn how to create, host, and distribute plugin catalogues for teams and communities.

.claude/plugins/my-marketplace/.claude-p.label: Marketplace Catalogue
.claude/plugins/my-marketplace/.claude-p.description: The marketplace.json file lists plugins and where to fetch them from.

src/index.ts.label: Entry Point
src/index.ts.description: The application entry point - a demo source file to give the project context.

CLAUDE.md.label: Project Memory
CLAUDE.md.description: The file Claude reads at the start of every session. Your project's persistent memory.

.mcp.json.label: MCP Configuration
.mcp.json.description: Connect Claude to external tools, APIs, and services via the Model Context Protocol.
